mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cabinet_slot WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM cabinet_slot WHERE cabinet_id = #{cabinetId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY slot_no ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM cabinet_slot WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT cs.* FROM cabinet_slot cs INNER JOIN cabinet c ON c.id = cs.cabinet_id AND c.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1 WHERE cs.item_id = #{itemId} AND cs.deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(cs.status, 0) != 2 AND COALESCE(cs.item_quantity, 0) > 0 ORDER BY cs.item_quantity ASC, c.cabinet_no ASC, cs.slot_no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cabinet_slot (cabinet_id, slot_no, item_id, board_addr, lock_number, sensor_id, weight_limit, item_quantity, status, created_at, deleted) VALUES (#{cabinetId}, #{slotNo}, #{itemId}, #{boardAddr}, #{lockNumber}, #{sensorId}, #{weightLimit}, #{itemQuantity}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, COALESCE(#{deleted}, 0))
mapper.update: UPDATE cabinet_slot SET cabinet_id = #{cabinetId}, slot_no = #{slotNo}, item_id = #{itemId}, board_addr = #{boardAddr}, lock_number = #{lockNumber}, sensor_id = #{sensorId}, weight_limit = #{weightLimit}, item_quantity = #{itemQuantity}, status = #{status}, created_at = #{createdAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
